Expert view: Crude must cool to $70–75 for Nifty 50 to sustain above 25,000, says Shrikant Chouhan of Kotak Securities
india_trends.summary: Shrikant Chouhan from Kotak Securities emphasizes the critical need for crude oil prices to drop to $70–75 per barrel for the Nifty 50 index to maintain momentum beyond 25,000. He advocates for selective investment in large-cap companies amidst ongoing market uncertainties.
